items.title: Arsenal to complete shock free transfer of Illan Meslier, 26, after Leeds exit, paving way for current keeper to leave
items.summary: ARSENAL are set to sign goalkeeper Illan Meslier after his contract with Leeds expired. The Frenchman, 26, became a free agent at the end of last month and has been on the hunt for a new club ahead of the new Premier League season. Arsenal have swooped and Meslier is due to undergo a medical...
